# Works With Agents — MCP Server

> MCP server with 12 tools for UK tender and bid compliance.

## Quick start

```bash
docker run -p 3000:3000 ghcr.io/vystartasv/agent-tools:latest
```

Point your agent at `http://localhost:3000/mcp`.

## Tool manifest

Full machine-readable tool definitions at:
https://workswithagents.dev/dev/tools.json

## Tools (12)

- bidcheck: RFP / tender compliance analyzer
- plaincheck: Plain-English readability grader
- timelinecheck: Tender timeline extractor
- scorecheck: Bid score simulator
- obligcheck: Contract obligation tracker
- pqqcheck: PQQ question planner
- esgcheck: ESG statement validator
- bidmate: Bid / No-Bid decision tool
- riskcheck: Contract risk assessor
- winthesis: Win theme builder
- grantcheck: Grant application checker
- pricecheck: Pricing schedule validator

## Links

- Homepage: https://workswithagents.com
- MCP Server docs: https://workswithagents.dev
- GitHub: https://github.com/vystartasv/agent-tools
